mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, plate_number, vehicle_type, is_special, remark, create_time, update_time FROM vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, plate_number, vehicle_type, is_special, remark, create_time, update_time FROM vehicle ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle (user_id, plate_number, vehicle_type, is_special, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{plateNumber}, #{vehicleType}, #{isSpecial}, #{remark})
